Notes: UWP scored last 10 points of first quarter to take 18-16 lead...UWO outscored
UWP by counts of 15-8 in the second quarter and 13-8 in the third to take a
44-34 advantage...UWO got 20 points and 6 rebounds from Porath...UWP got 16
points and 14 rebounds from Domask...UWO defeated UWP, 66-56, on Jan. 19.
Game.Officials: Kirk Grimes Sr., Andrew Riechers, Ron  Quirk
